title: Hypr Minecraft
description: A PvP pack made for/by Scarce Koi that uses the beautiful Catppuccin UI resource pack.
body:
# Uses [Catppuccin UI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/catppuccin-ui)
This pack aims to be a simple PvP pack that uses Catppuccin UI.

## Why Should I Use this Pack?
It has a nice dark UI along with PvP textures to improve PvP. This way, you aren't blinded by the default light UI.

## What are Some Things it Includes?
- Short swords
- Smooth blocks (e.g. concrete)
- Catppucin UI (Dark UI)

## What is Planned?
- More block and item changes
- More version support
- More mod support
